response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq, but falls well short of a Principal/Director-level IC profile. Total experience is roughly 13-15 years depending on how freelance work is counted, with no demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership, no advanced degree in AI, no recognized AI products, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or driving cloud/AI strategy at scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Track record of public knowledge sharing through talks, workshops, and OSS founding (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products at the scale a Principal AI Strategy role demands
Career trajectory is senior IC, not Director-level — lacks strategic advisory or platform-leadership scope
Cloud experience is limited (AWS CDK on one role); no deep cloud-platform or infrastructure-strategy footprint

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise or AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC expectation
Emerging AI-agent/MCP work at current role
